arts.ttl: Brentford loanee Mads Roerslev in contention for first Bundesliga start
arts.sum: Brentford loanee Mads Roerslev might be in line for his Bundesliga starting XI debut this coming Saturday. The Dane’s current German outfit, Wolfsburg, are without Kilian Fischer, who is suspended.…

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank reveals extent of Sepp van den Berg injury ahead of Brentford's clash with Leicester City
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank provides an update on Sepp van den Berg's injury status ahead of Friday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.

Leicester were on course for a commendable point against Arsenal last week, but came unstuck late on as they eventually fell to a 2-0 loss to the Gunners. The Foxes have now lost nine of their last 10...

arts.ttl: Leicester City injury latest ahead of Brentford clash
arts.sum: Justin, who has played more minutes than any other Leicester City player this season, was substituted just before half-time in the 2-0 defeat to Arsenal on Saturday. James Justin is set to miss Friday’s clash with Brentford but the right-back’s injury is not a serious one, manager Ruud van Nistelrooy has said.

arts.ttl: Leeds United to battle Everton, Leicester City in hunt for Premier League defender?
arts.sum: Leeds United are reportedly in the race for Southampton defender Kyle Walker-Peters, with Everton and Leicester City also keen on the full-back.
